product_summary: Lablr helps users decode product labels by combining OCR extraction with ingredient-level explanations and risk context.
target_users: Consumers reading skincare, food, and OTC labels
Users who need fast mobile-friendly label interpretation
core_capabilities: Upload image or submit image URL
Show confidence signals and source context

quality_goals.availability: Landing page and core endpoints are reachable
quality_goals.validation: Invalid input paths fail with deterministic errors
quality_goals.safety: Oversized and unsupported uploads are blocked
quality_goals.integrity: Required MCP data assets are present and readable
quality_goals.documentation: Environment defaults and limits are consistent

acceptance_criteria: At least 10 and at most 15 executable test cases
Each case stored as a standalone TC file
Suite generates markdown, html, and json report artifacts
All artifacts are saved under testsprite_tests/
